characteristics.$text:
Spend 2 mutation tokens. Summon a duplicate of this character in range 1-2 without this ability. Then duplicate all positive tokens on this character and place them on the copy.
• This ability can only be used once per combat.
• May destroy all walls in the duplicate’s space before placing it.

sharedRules.name: Spare Parts
sharedRules.description: If an ability has spare parts, the unit may absorb any number of adjacent corpses at the start of this ability to grant it additional effects, removing those corpses.

sharedRules.name: Mutate
sharedRules.description: hen a unit mutates, it gains a mutation token. Mutation tokens can be discarded instead of discarding any other token. (Mutation tokens can be a stand-in and act as a ‘copy’ for any other token, allowing you to keep the original)

characteristics.name: Effect
